description: Register these tools in OpenManus / LangGraph so the runtime calls Karma BFF instead of chain RPC directly.

tools.name: karma_create_task
tools.description: Register a new task with trace_id for end-to-end correlation.

tools.name: karma_submit_order_snapshot
tools.description: Attach buyer-confirmed order snapshot JSON after user agrees in chat.

tools.name: karma_request_buyer_lock_page
tools.description: Get HTTPS URL for buyer wallet lock (no private keys in OpenManus).

tools.name: karma_append_execution_receipt
tools.description: Append one ExecutionReceipt-shaped record after a tool step (only after EXECUTE_ALLOWED).

tools.name: karma_build_evidence_and_settlement_plan
tools.description: Structural evidence bundle + offchain settlement plan mapping to NonCustodialAgentPayment.

tools.name: karma_get_task_status
tools.description: Poll integration state + receipt count + public URLs (HMAC). Message: timestamp + '\n' + empty body.

tools.name: karma_get_buyer_public_status
tools.description: Read-only JSON for Web/Bot UIs (no HMAC). Same core fields as public status.

tools.name: karma_bilateral_lock
tools.description: Lock USDC into KarmaBilateral and mint a Bill Token. Both buyer and agent must lock before binding.

tools.name: karma_bilateral_bind
tools.description: Bilaterally bind buyer + agent Bill Tokens into a Binding. Bills are frozen until settled.

tools.name: karma_bilateral_settle
tools.description: Submit settlement proof. Binding enters FINALIZING. After dispute window, call finalize.

tools.name: karma_bilateral_finalize
tools.description: Finalize settlement after dispute window closes. Burns bills and releases USDC.

tools.name: karma_bilateral_status
tools.description: Query full binding status — state, bill states, USDC locked, action flags.
